raw_consumer_statement:
American Express refused to initiate a dispute for a {$660.00} charge from XX/XX/year>, involving merchant fraud ( Order # XXXX ). 
The merchant engaged in a 'Bait and Switch ' scam, issuing a {$640.00} XXXX  contract and later demanding an illegal 150 % surcharge ( {$970.00} additional ). The merchant intentionally stalled for time to exceed the 60-day window. 
Despite speaking with a supervisor ( XXXX ), American Express claimed they 'are n't able to dispute this charge because of the time '. This ignores the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) protections for services not received. The bank failed to investigate the documented merchant fraud and misrepresentation. I request the CFPB to compel American Express to investigate this clear breach of contract
